markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to discuss programmatic SEO strategies and implementation with Fabrizio, an experienced SEO consultant, for GrowthX's client engagements.](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Programmatic SEO success requires balancing quality and quantity, with a focus on user experience and business relevance](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Phased approach recommended: start with small batches, validate performance, then scale up](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [Technical setup crucial: need flexible CMS or dedicated engineering resources for efficient implementation](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=3540.0)
  - [KPI setting and attribution modeling critical for demonstrating value, especially in early stages](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=2707.0)

## Topics

### Programmatic SEO Approach at Wise

  - [Three-tiered approach:](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
    1.  Standalone applications (e.g., currency calculator)
    2.  Editorial content for exploration
    3.  Scalable landing pages via custom CMS
  - [Phased launches: start with MVP, iterate based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [Example: Invoice templates started as basic landing pages, evolved to interactive widgets](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=2477.0)

### Planning and Execution

  - [Template mapping: cluster keywords around potential page types](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Assess template viability: size, difficulty to build, user experience importance](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Minimum viable set of templates to validate concept before full build-out](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [Flexibility in approach: sometimes full engineering involvement, other times CMS-based](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)

### Resourcing and Technical Considerations

  - [Ideal: dedicated engineer(s) familiar with client's systems](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=3926.0)
  - [Alternative: technical SEO specialists with development skills](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=4129.0)
  - [Challenge: balancing brand consistency with speed of implementation](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=3795.0)
  - [Consider API/data dependencies early in planning](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)

### Performance Measurement and Expectations

  - [Early KPIs: indexed pages and pages with clicks (first 3-6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=2707.0)
  - [Revenue attribution may take longer, especially for competitive verticals](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=2719.0)
  - [Set realistic timelines: 6-12 months for initial traction, potentially longer for significant revenue](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=2774.0)

### Client Engagement Strategy

  - [Educate clients on phased approach and realistic timelines](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)
  - [Focus on quick wins and demonstrable progress in first 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=4260.0)
  - [Balance between aggressive growth and sustainable quality](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create shared Slack channel for ongoing discussions and examples](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=4260.0)
  - [GrowthX team to document and systematize learnings from this meeting](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=4321.0)
  - [Fabrizio to review GrowthX's documentation and provide additional insights](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=4373.0)
  - [Explore specific client scenarios (e.g., Stacklets) for tailored advice](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=4352.0)
  - [Consider developing a specialized team/roles for programmatic SEO implementation](https://fathom.video/share/-6uadW7KW-kJpeb7EjyaRopT_R69SA4g?tab=summary&timestamp=4080.0)
